title: Looking for a Monday.com expert to temporarily assist with an existing setup for a coal mine project
excerpt: We are currently seeking a Monday.com specialist to optimise our current setup. Situated on a coal mine in central Queensland, we require an on-site consultant for an estimated duration of 2-3 weeks, with all travel and …

posts.author: BenMacdonald (Ben Macdonald)
posts.cookedHtml: We are currently seeking a Monday.com specialist to optimise our current setup. Situated on a coal mine in central Queensland, we require an on-site consultant for an estimated duration of 2-3 weeks, with all travel and accommodation expenses covered.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BenMacdonald

Welcome to the monday .com community!

Optimizing monday .com’s productivity starts with setting up digital boards and workflows. With the implementation of automated workflows, managing and tracking relationships with your workforce and business contacts becomes easier. By automating manual and tedious workflows, you cut down on numerous tasks that your workforce would otherwise spend an exorbitant amount of time on. This encompasses responsibilities like scheduling calls, following up with prospects/leads, and sending reminders. Moreover, integrating monday .com with your enterprise tools like Google Calendar, Slack, and MS Teams enables you to drive efficiency.

If you’re seeking extra hands to organize monday .com at an affordable cost, hiring monday.com consultants from a recognized partner company is the right option. They can help your organization with automated work management and ensure that workflows are aligned with your business needs.
